Yoshi

Yoshi is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. He is a friendly dinosaur who often assists Mario on his adventures to rescue Princess Peach from the villain Bowser.

Yoshi is known for his long tongue, ability to lay eggs, and his distinctive green color. He has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. He is one of the most iconic and recognizable video game characters in history.
